titleStmt.title: SII 23.592: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 592. (A.R. No. 592 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the same wall Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāndya (II). Year 10:

summary.p: This is also an inscription of the same king. The details of date here given viz. Vyaya, Tulā, śu. 12, Monday, Śatabhishaj, would yield the equivalent A.D. 1286, September 30, regnal year being 11. This registers a gift of two pieces of areca-nut garden and house sites after purchase by the same donor mentioned in No. 591 above, whose full name is given as Eḍuttakaiyaḻagiyār Piḷḷai Pallavarāyaṉ of Tuñjalūr in Tirumiḻalaikkūṟṟam a district in Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam, to provide for offerings, worship and lamps to the image of Emberumāṉār set up in the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ at Nirandanūr by one Ānaimēlaḻagiyār of Vīraśikhāmukhachchēri Kaḷattūr a suburb of Vīranārayaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Śōḻamaṇḍalam and also for the maintenance of a maṭha presided over by this teacher (?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaṟkiṟti muṉṉuṭaittākak koccaṭaparmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara vattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu vyayasamvaasarattut tulānāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu dvā
daśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamai peṟṟa catayattunāḷ pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu tirumiḻalaikkūṟṟattu tuñcalūruṭaiyār Eṭuttakaiyyaḻakiyarāṉa piḷḷai pallavarāyaneṉ Atirājendramaṇḍala
ttu meṟpākkaināṭṭu nirantaṉūrāṉa Akarabrahmadeyam śrīkulot tuṅkacoḻac caturvedimaṅkalattu śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ cokkapperumāḷ koyili
le Iṉakku naṉṟāka Eṉṉuṭaiya brāhmaṇaṉ muṉṉāka Ivvūr sarvamānya māka perumāḷ Udakampaṇṇiyaruḷiṉapaṭikku kalluveṭṭuvikkaikku vanta coḻamaṇṭalattu śrīviranārāya
ṇaccaturvedimaṅkalattu śrīviraśikhāmukhaccerik kaḷattūr Āṉaimelaḻaki yār Ukantaruḷappaṇṇuvitta Emperumāṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttup paṭi tiruviḷakku śeṣamākavum I
vaṟku maṭamākavum tūppil cannāvuṭaiyāḻvarāṉa piḷḷai saujanya cūḍāmaṇi Ivvūril koṇṭuṭaiya gṛhakṣetraṅkaḷil Ivar piḷḷai kaḷammaṇum maruma rum pakkal Ivarkaḷ
Aiñciṭṭu mukkūṟṟil nāṉ koṇṭa gṛhakṣetrattukku Eḻutiṉa pramāṇappaṭi kuḷakuḷapaṭṭiyil kamukantoṭṭa nilam kuḻi nūṟṟāṟinālum ceri meṟkaṭaik kamukunilamāka Aḷantu
kaṇṭa nilaṅ kuḻi Eṇpatum Ittāl vanta bhāgāśrayamum Itil porākkuṟaikku Ūravar namakkuc colli varaviṭa śrīdevivatikku kiḻa kottarkaḷ paṭṭikku vaṭakku
nilattil teṉmeṟkaṭaya veḷāḷarkaḷmaṭattile Ipporāk kuṟaikku nān paṟṟiṉa kamukanilam kuḻi Irupatum Āka Ivviraṇṭu vyaktiyāl kamukan toṭṭa nilaṅku
ḻi ṉūṟum Ivaittāluḷḷa bhāgāśrayamum Ivvūril vayakkal teruvil kiḻakkiṭṭu maṉai nālu nitta Ittoṭuñ cera Aiñcā maṉaiyil meṟkaṭaiyum Āṟām maṉaiyil
kiḻakkaṭayavum maṉaiyum Irupatteṭṭe mukkālil meṟkaṭaiya Ivar kaḷ Aiñciṭṭu mukkūṟṟāluḷḷa maṉaiyum patiṉeḻekālum Ittāl vanta talaikkaṭay piḻakkaṭai
prāptiyum melnokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟumakappaṭa Iv Emperumānāṟku maṭamākavum Iṉṟiiṉṉilaṅkaḷile Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi tiruviḷakku śeṣa
mākavum kuṭuttu Ācandrārkam Ippaṭi collakaṭavatāka śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Eṭutta kaiyyaḻakiyārāṉa piḷḷai pallavarāya ṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.592 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
